title: clerodendrum palmatolobatum
intro: Clerodendrum palmatolobatum, also known as the wild mandarin or butterfly clerodendron, is a tropical plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum palmatolobatum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Clerodendrum palmatolobatum include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are made by boiling the leaves and flowers of the plant in water.
